_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟡 Minor_

**Preserve explicit config values instead of truthiness fallback.**

Line 48 and Line 49 use `or`, so explicit `0` values are discarded and replaced by fallback/default values. This can change cooldown semantics unexpectedly.



<details>

```diff
-        dedup_window_min = config.get("dedup_window_min") or config.get("dedupWindowMin", 30)

+            config.get("max_attempts")
+            if config.get("max_attempts") is not None

+        )
```
